global_context.scene_description: A pixel-accurate full-frame screenshot mockup of a Google business review card, rendered in Google Maps DARK MODE UI exactly as it appears on a mobile device. NOT a phone bezel, NOT a hand holding a phone — just the review card UI fills the frame edge-to-edge against a dark near-black background (#1F1F1F). The card has authentic Google Maps review formatting and looks like a real screenshot. Layout from top to bottom: (1) A small circular profile photo placeholder in the top-left, slightly stylized (a small abstract avatar or photo of a young woman, indistinct, with a small Google Local Guide pin marker overlaid in the bottom-right of the avatar). (2) Reviewer name 'Courtnee Buelna' in bold white sans-serif. (3) Below the name in muted grey: 'Local Guide · 36 reviews · 27 photos'. (4) A three-dot menu icon (⋮) in the top-right corner. (5) Five yellow gold stars (★★★★★) in a horizontal row, followed by muted grey text 'a year ago'. (6) The main review body text in white sans-serif at body-text size, generously line-spaced, reading exactly: 'Ashton installed a new unit on my home. He gave me a fair honest quote and was extremely professional throughout. I did not feel pressured to purchase anything extra, and his company offers great perks for veterans and first responders. Highly recommend.' (7) At the bottom of the card, a small heart icon followed by muted grey text 'Hover to react', then a share icon (⎙ or arrow symbol). The entire card uses Google's Roboto-style sans-serif typography. Background near-black, text white/grey hierarchy, stars gold-yellow. Mood: completely native Google review UI — the goal is for this to read indistinguishably from a real Google Maps review screenshot. NOT decorative, NOT branded as ad creative — pure UI fidelity.
